name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
description: An enterprise commerce platform (B2C) providing storefront, shopper, and admin REST APIs (SCAPI/Shopper APIs and Admin APIs) for products, baskets, orders, customers, and related commerce operations.

auth_methods.note: The official Commerce API (SCAPI) overview documentation indicates API requests are authorized using OAuth 2.0 access tokens (Bearer tokens) for shopper/admin API access.

credential_access.note: API clients and credentials are created in a merchant's Business Manager (requires access to a Commerce Cloud instance/Business Manager account, which is provisioned to customers), and Commerce Cloud pricing/page instructs contacting sales for purchase — indicating credentials are not publicly self-servable without merchant/admin access.

api_surface.note: The Commerce API (SCAPI) overview describes a REST API surface spanning shopper and admin commerce resources/endpoints (for example catalog/product data, baskets/carts, orders, customers, and related commerce functionality).

buildability.note: Although documentation and API details are public and REST APIs are well-documented, obtaining working API credentials requires access to a merchant Business Manager (provisioned by purchasing or admin approval). Pricing/contact-sales pages indicate no public self-serve signup; therefore building an integration is blocked until access to a Commerce Cloud instance and Business Manager credentials are obtained.

queries: Salesforce Commerce Cloud developer documentation API developer.salesforce.com/docs/commerce Commerce Cloud SCAPI
